display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Room Full of Cheese
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Room Full of Cheese.png}} {{E|Room Full of Cheese|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found in the {{2|Overgrowth}}, the {{2|Underdocks}}, and the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Gorge}} {{TS|positive||Choose 2 of 8 random {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common|Common|2}} cards to add to your Deck.}} * The 8 cards will not contain any duplicates. {{Frame|Search}} {{TS|negative||Lose 14 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain {{R|The Chosen Cheese||2}} (relic).}} * {{R|The Chosen Cheese||2}}: At the end of combat, gain 1 Max HP. == Notes == * Choosing the {{Frame|Gorge}} option with {{R|Silver Crucible||2}} charges remaining will consume 1 charge and upgrade all the card options, allowing you to obtain 2 {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common|Commons|2}} for only 1 {{R|Silver Crucible||2}} charge. * As each character has 20 Commons, the chance of any specific Common card appearing is 40%. == Dialogue ==
This room is full of cheese!!! You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more cheese. The candles in this room appear to be made of cheese. The furniture is also cheese.
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut. It is made of cheese.
{{Frame|Gorge}}
You take a little nibble of cheese but this fuels you to eat even more cheese. Time passes... You have eaten an awe-inspiring amount of cheese.
Tonight, dreams will be cheese.
{{Frame|Search}}
You scrounge about for hours and hours... Time slips by as your mind travels to strange places from the sheer presence of all this cheese, and you fade into a stupor...
You snap awake and realize you're holding something. The Chosen Cheese.
